tasks.title: CYCLE 1 — AUTOGEN: Research Synthesis
tasks.description: Auto-generated cycle to turn research into actionable improvements.

tasks.title: [RESEARCH] Synthesize improvements from latest research
tasks.description: Review the latest research artifact and extract 3 candidate improvements. For each, include the evidence/source, expected benefit, and an initial test plan. Update the IMPROVE/EVAL tasks below with concrete acceptance criteria.

tasks.title: [IMPROVE] Implement highest-value improvement
tasks.description: Implement the top-ranked improvement from the synthesis task. Update tests and docs as needed. Run the test suite before marking done.

tasks.title: [EVAL] Validate improvement impact
tasks.description: Evaluate the implemented improvement using existing eval tools or reports. Record results in agent/reports and note whether to keep or revert.
